The proton beam extracted from the
accelerator tube of the electrostatic generator was
rotated through an angle of 90 degrees by an analyzing
electromagnet, rigidly collimated by a system of nickel
diaphragms, and directed to a target located in the
center of the scattering chamber. The target in the
form of a thin foil could be installed at any angle to

Cu-65: Target 5 microns thick, electrolytically made of
